name: SRUM — System Resource Usage Monitor
categoryDescription: Program execution evidence beyond the Uninstall/Amcache layer — BAM, SRUM, Syscache, and configuration affecting execution artifacts.
description: SRUM records network usage, application CPU/memory usage, and push notification data in an ESE database (%SystemRoot%\System32\sru\SRUDB.dat). The registry key lists the active SRUM extension GUIDs.
forensic_value: SRUM database is separate from the registry but the extension GUID list here confirms which data categories are being collected. The actual SRUM database (srudb.dat) contains 30+ days of granular app execution and network usage telemetry — parse with SRUM-DUMP or SrumECmd.
